sealed_at_gate: Gate 1 (recon-proven, MUSTER_RECON.md; sign-off 2026-07-16, sealed in Phase 2)

file.provenance: huggingface.co/deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-9B-GGUF (upstream tree verified 2026-07-16: size and sha256 exact match; license mit; not gated). This file is also the pinned quantization SOURCE for the in-house Ornith requants (qa/ornith/constrained-vram/QUANT_QUALITY_TABLE.md:4).

named_blockers.statement: BF16 is absent from the runnable lane's covered quant set (is_covered_quant, src/runnable/admit.rs:177-190); live admission reject: 'unsupported quant BF16 in tensor output.weight'. Adding it requires committed BF16 dequant-parity evidence per the lane spec.

No non-runnable vehicle exists for qwen35: the architecture is implemented only in the runnable lane (src/api/mod.rs:5159-5161; src/model.rs:613-622), so the quant contract's BF16 'supported — reference CPU tensor path' item (src/api/mod.rs:2786-2790) cannot bind this architecture.

17,920,696,512 B (16.7 GiB) exceeds the 15.7 GiB host RAM; the runnable lane loads every weight resident (src/runnable/model.rs:369). Static GPU plan: plan-offload PLAN FAILED — 'model cannot run even fully offloaded: short by 454 MiB' (reproduced 2026-07-16, metadata-only). The oracle capture leg is equally over-RAM on this host, so no side-by-side is executable here regardless of Camelid-side work. Precedent: the requant imatrix was deliberately computed on the Q8_0 host for exactly this reason (QUANT_QUALITY_TABLE.md:6-8). Per the runnable-lane memory policy this is a host limit, not an engine refusal.

oracle_side_control: llama.cpp acd79d603 (build 9632) supports the arch and BF16 — this file is the hash-verified source the pinned requants were produced from (QUANT_QUALITY_TABLE.md:4) — isolating blockers 1-2 to Camelid coverage and blocker 3 to the host.
chip_consequence: admitted=false in the live scan; the Models-page NotAnchoredRow chip renders for the scanned file; the chat chip was never observed for it and no lane exists to make it generation-ready at this head.
exit_condition: HOLD until (a) a BF16 runnable-lane dequant-parity gate lands AND (b) a qwen35-capable vehicle can hold the weights (larger-RAM host or a streaming lane built for the runnable runtime) — or the row is retired from the roster.
environment: head b80788c9 tree (Gate 1 sealed); RTX 3060 Laptop 6144 MiB; 15.7 GiB RAM; Windows 11 build 26220
